---
title: "Workshop 03 - Data Analysis in R"
date: 2024-09-01
facilitator: "Maria Lopez"
categories: [r-programming, data-analysis, visualisation]
description: "Cleaning, analysing, and visualising arboreal biodiversity data using R and the tidyverse."
---

## About This Workshop

This workshop focuses on data analysis workflows for arboreal biodiversity data using R and the tidyverse. Participants will clean, summarise, and visualise field data collected in previous workshops, building reproducible analysis pipelines.

---

## Prerequisites

Before attending, please ensure you have:

- Completed Workshops 01 and 02
- Updated R and RStudio to the latest versions
- Installed required packages: `install.packages(c("tidyverse", "ggplot2"))`
- Downloaded the workshop dataset from the Materials section below

---

## Timetable

| Day | Date | Topics | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Day 1](day-01.qmd) | 01 Sep 2024 | Tidyverse intro, Data Cleaning, ggplot2 basics | Maria Lopez, John Smith |
| [Day 2](day-02.qmd) | 02 Sep 2024 | Advanced summarisation, Final visualisation exercise | Maria Lopez, John Smith |

---

## Materials

### Slides

| Day | Link |
|---|---|
| Day 1 | [View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-primary} |
| Day 2 | [View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-primary} |

### R Scripts

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [analysis.R](analysis.R) | Full analysis script for both days |

### Reference Documents

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [reference.pdf](reference.pdf) | tidyverse cheatsheet and ggplot2 reference |
